rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>对了，<unk[5:0]>您已经去过
这里<Color=red>东边<Color=white>的<Color=red>卡卡利科村<Color=white>了吗？
卡卡利科村位于险峻的山间，
以前并没有那么多人造访，
<unk[3:0:264]>但自从全世界都很少见的<unk[5:0]><Color=red>圆环形左纳乌遗迹<Color=white>
掉落下来，那里变得相当热闹了呢。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>對了，<unk[5:0]>您已經去過
<Color=red>東邊<Color=white>的<Color=red>卡卡利科村<Color=white>了嗎？
卡卡利科村位於陡峭險峻的山中，
以前沒什麼人會去造訪那裡，
<unk[3:0:264]>不過由於世上罕見的<unk[5:0]><Color=red>環狀左納烏遺跡<Color=white>掉進村子，
所以現在變得相當熱鬧喔。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>そうだ<unk[5:0]> ここから<Color=red><Ruby={2:6}ひがし>東<Color=white>にある
<Color=red>カカリコ<Ruby={2:4}むら>村<Color=white>には もう<Ruby={2:2}い>行かれましたか？
カカリコ<Ruby={2:4}むら>村は <Ruby={2:4}けわ>険しい<Ruby={2:4}やま>山の<Ruby={2:6}あいだ>間にあって
<Ruby={4:6}いぜん>以前は そんなに<Ruby={2:6}おとず>訪れる<Ruby={2:4}ひと>人も いなかったんですが
<unk[3:0:264]><Ruby={6:10}せかいてき>世界的にも<Ruby={2:6}めずら>珍しい<unk[5:0]><Color=red><Ruby={2:2}わ>輪っかの<Ruby={2:6}かたち>形をしたゾナウ<Ruby={4:6}いせき>遺跡<Color=white>が
<Ruby={2:2}お>落ちてきて ずいぶん<Ruby={2:4}にぎ>賑やかになったんですよ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>That's right! <unk[5:0]>Have you already been to
<Color=red>Kakariko Village <Color=white>out <Color=red>east<Color=white>?

Kakariko Village is located between two
steep mountains, so visitors to the village
used to be few and far between.
<unk[3:0:264]>However, ever since those distinctive
<Color=red>ring-shaped Zonai ruins <Color=white>landed there,<unk[5:0]>
things have been pretty lively!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:26 65 100 109 105 114 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 48]>哦！客人您眼光真不错！

那个圆环形状的饰品，很好看吧？
是附近的<Color=red>卡卡利科村<Color=white>的纪念品哦。
据说它是按照稀奇的
圆环形左纳乌遗迹设计的。
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>您如果想买的话，
一定要去这里<Color=red>东边<Color=white>的<Color=red>卡卡利科村<Color=white>看看！
那附近有一座<Color=red>鸟望台<Color=white>，
想必您很快就能找到的。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:26 65 100 109 105 114 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 48]>哦！客人您的眼光真不錯！

那個環狀飾品很好看吧？
那是附近<Color=red>卡卡利科村<Color=white>的土產喔。
據說是以稀有的環狀左納烏遺跡為主題
製作而成的呢。
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>如果您想購買的話，
請前往<Color=red>東邊<Color=white>的<Color=red>卡卡利科村<Color=white>看看吧！
村子附近有一座<Color=red>鳥望台<Color=white>，
我想您很快就能找到位置。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:26 65 100 109 105 114 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 48]>おっ！<unk[5:0]> お<Ruby={2:6}きゃく>客さんお<Ruby={2:2}め>目が<Ruby={2:4}たか>高いですね！

その<Ruby={2:2}わ>輪っかの<Ruby={2:4}かざ>飾り <Ruby={4:6}すてき>素敵でしょう？<unk[5:0]>
この<Ruby={2:4}ちか>近くにある <Color=red>カカリコ<Ruby={2:4}むら>村<Color=white>の<Ruby={6:10}みやげもの>土産物なんですよ
<Ruby={2:2}わ>輪っかの<Ruby={2:6}かたち>形をした <Ruby={2:6}めずら>珍しいゾナウ<Ruby={4:6}いせき>遺跡にちなんで
<Ruby={2:4}つく>作ったらしいですよ
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>お<Ruby={2:4}もと>求めになりたければ ここから<Color=red><Ruby={2:6}ひがし>東<Color=white>にある
<Color=red>カカリコ<Ruby={2:4}むら>村<Color=white>でぜひ！
<Ruby={2:4}ちか>近くに<Color=red><Ruby={6:14}ちょうぼうだい>鳥望台<Color=white>がありますから
<Ruby={4:6}ばしょ>場所は すぐわかると<Ruby={2:4}おも>思いますよ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:26 65 100 109 105 114 97 116 105 111 110 95 48 48]>Aha. Our decoration caught your fancy,
did it? Clearly you have a discerning eye!

That lovely little wreath is a souvenir from
nearby <Color=red>Kakariko Village<Color=white>.

The artisan apparently based it on the
unusual ring-shaped Zonai ruins that
landed over there.
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>If you'd like one to take with you, it's only
a short trip <Color=red>east<Color=white> to <Color=red>Kakariko Village<Color=white>!

There's a <Color=red>Skyview Tower <Color=white>just nearby, so
I can't imagine you'll have any trouble
finding the place.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>客人……
您要是对那个<Color=red>环卡饰品<Color=white>那么感兴趣的话，
就去<Color=red>卡卡利科村<Color=white>买一个吧。

<unk[3:0:263]>村子就在这里东边的<Color=red>鸟望台<Color=white>附近，
想必您很快就能找到的。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>客人，
既然您這麼在意那個<Color=red>環卡飾品<Color=white>，
那麼請您前往<Color=red>卡卡利科村<Color=white>購買吧。

<unk[3:0:263]>從這往東走能看到一座<Color=red>鳥望台<Color=white>，村子就在那附近。

trouble finding it.

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]>If you like our <Color=red>ring garland <Color=white>that much,
then maybe you should go to <Color=red>Kakariko
Village<Color=white> and buy your own.
It's near the <Color=red>Skyview Tower<Color=white> to the east,
so it shouldn't take you long to figure out
your way there.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我决定在那边挂上一幅……<unk[5:0]>
神～秘而庄严的<unk[5:0]><Color=red>大女神像<Color=white>的图画。
大女神像，顾名思义就是
相当巨大的女神像。
<unk[3:0:268]>海拉鲁各地都在默默供奉，
但准确的地点却鲜有人知……
这附近的话，<Color=red>海拉鲁平原西南方<Color=white>
似乎就有一座供奉大女神像的神殿，
<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:20 84 114 111 117 98 108 101 95 48 48]>不过我是没有找到……<unk[5:0]>
说不定在难以骑马过去的地方……
哪怕只是找张图画看看大女神像的样子，<unk[5:0]>
我就能直接临摹了啊。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我決定<unk[5:0]>在那裡掛上一幅
神秘且尊貴的～<unk[5:0]><Color=red>大女神像<Color=white>的圖。
大女神像就如同字面上的意思，<unk[5:0]>
是一種格外巨大的女神像。
<unk[3:0:268]>據說它們被悄悄地供奉在海拉魯各地，
很少人知道其確切位置……
這附近的話，聽說在<Color=red>海拉魯平原的西南方<Color=white>
就有供奉大女神像的神殿。
<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:20 84 114 111 117 98 108 101 95 48 48]>然而我卻怎麼找都找不到……<unk[5:0]>
我想神殿大概坐落在馬匹難以抵達的地方吧……
乾脆找張圖來看算了，<unk[5:0]>
要是能看到大女神像我就可以直接摹繪了。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>あそこには<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={6:10}しんぴてき>神秘的でありがた～い<unk[5:0]>
<Color=red><Ruby={8:14}だいめがみぞう>大女神像<Color=white>さまの<Ruby={2:2}え>絵を<Ruby={2:4}かざ>飾るって <Ruby={2:2}き>決めてるんです
<Ruby={8:14}だいめがみぞう>大女神像さまというのは <Ruby={6:10}ことばどお>言葉通り<unk[5:0]>
ひときわ<Ruby={2:4}おお>大きな <Ruby={6:10}めがみぞう>女神像さまのことです
<unk[3:0:268]>ハイラル<Ruby={4:6}かくち>各地に ひっそりと<Ruby={2:4}まつ>祀られていて
<Ruby={4:8}せいかく>正確な<Ruby={4:6}ばしょ>場所を<Ruby={2:2}し>知る<Ruby={2:4}ひと>人は <Ruby={2:4}すく>少ないとか…
<Ruby={2:4}ちか>近いところだと<Color=red> ハイラル<Ruby={4:8}へいげん>平原から<Ruby={4:8}なんせい>南西<Color=white>にも
<Ruby={8:14}だいめがみぞう>大女神像さまのおわす<Ruby={4:8}しんでん>神殿が あるとの<Ruby={2:4}こと>事ですが
<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:20 84 114 111 117 98 108 101 95 48 48]><Ruby={2:6}わたし>私には <Ruby={2:2}み>見つけられなくてですね…<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}うま>馬では <Ruby={2:2}い>行きにくい<Ruby={4:6}ばしょ>場所にあるのかも…
いっそ<Ruby={2:2}え>絵でもいいから<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={8:14}だいめがみぞう>大女神像さまの<Ruby={2:6}すがた>姿を
<Ruby={2:2}み>見られたら <Ruby={2:2}か>描き<Ruby={2:4}うつ>写しちゃうんですけどね
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>My mind is made up. I know just what to
hang on that wall...<unk[5:0]>a picture of a mystical,
blessed, <unk[5:0]><Color=red>Great Goddess Statue<Color=white>!
Oh, and if you're not already aware,<unk[5:0]> the
"great" in the name refers to how BIG
these statues are.
<unk[3:0:268]>They're quietly enshrined throughout
Hyrule, but not many people know their
exact locations...
The closest Great Goddess Statue to us
allegedly stands in a temple <Color=red>southwest of
Hyrule Field<Color=white>.
<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:20 84 114 111 117 98 108 101 95 48 48]>But all my search attempts have come
up empty. <unk[5:0]>Maybe it's somewhere that's
difficult to get to by horse...
But I don't need to see the real thing!<unk[5:0]>
If I had a drawing of the Great Goddess
Statue, I could copy it down and put it up!

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>The <Color=red>Great Goddess Statues<Color=white> stand tall
and tranquil, quietly watching over all
of Hyrule.
If I could paint a picture of one of them
for my wall, I'm sure it would keep our
stable peaceful too.
Apparently there's a Great Goddess
Statue enshrined in a sacred place
to the <Color=red>southwest of Hyrule Field<Color=white>...
<unk[3:0:10]>But I sure can't find it.<unk[5:0]> It might be in a
place that's difficult to get to by horse.

If I could paint a picture of one to watch
over my stable, I bet it would make this
place feel even more peaceful.

<unk[3:0:8]>It's a real blessing,<unk[5:0]> having an image of a

If you'd prefer a different angle or even a

to copy and display a new one too.
Simply give me the word, and show me
the new picture!

<unk[3:0:8]>Oh, Link, with the gift of one blessed
painting,<unk[5:0]> you've wrapped this stable in
a warm, cozy light.
With this Great Goddess Statue adorning
our walls, I'm sure the Goddess herself
will be watching over our visitors!
